Name: Aurigan pirates
Description: The unsettled and abandoned systems of the Rimward Frontier are a haven for pirates — both in-system predators and renegade JumpShip captains who transport pirate DropShips from one system to another, taking a cut of any illicit profits.
ReputationStatements: You crusty mercenary fuck. How about you help us out, just for once yeah? We're kinda desperate here.
I don't trust you, asshole. Sure as shit don't like you. You killed a buddy of mine on, where was it, that dead rock place? Urgh, that aside we've got an opportunity here.
You wanna get paid, don't you? Take this job, nice n' easy, we both come out ahead.
Making the Reach a less safer place. Ask no questions and it's payday.
This crazy shit seems to suit you. Pull this off, we both make a TON of money.
Yo, we've got something big! High risk, loads of metal, very illegal. You're interested, right?
My favorite criminal! Let's get a drink. Ya know, me and the boys have this killer score lined up, and it's HEAVY. Want in?
MissionSuccessStatements: Jesus, that haul’s worth a fortune. Knew hiring your crew was a smart move!
GoodFaithFailureStatements: So your crew didn't get the job done like we wanted, but at least you gave them the finger! Heh! I like that kind of guts, we'll get 'em next time
BadFaithFailureStatements: We paid for results, not a fucking retreat the moment things got hot. What a waste of time.
